metadata.description: Autonomous issue-to-PR agent runs, distributed as a single installable plugin.

plugins.name: bottega
plugins.description: One entry point, /bottega:run: the orchestrator reads the codebase, agrees a spec with the user in the conversation, puts costly decisions to a panel, builds with worker agents, has the integrated diff reviewed by both model families, and delivers a PR with QA evidence. The user appears twice: the spec OK and the merge.
